name: com.mycore.authkit
description: Reusable native sign-in for Unity (Sign in with Apple + Google Sign-In). Plain-class providers (no singleton) returning a provider-neutral AuthCredential via UniTask; backend-linking and persistence stay in your app. Each provider is a separate assembly gated by a define constraint, so projects pull in only the SDKs they use.

samples.description: How to turn an AuthCredential into a backend link + persistence (guarded by AUTHKIT_SAMPLES).
